title: polypodium alte-scandens
intro: Polypodium alte-scandens, also known as Polypodium pellucidum, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The Polypodium alte-scandens plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating digestive issues, as well as being used as a remedy for respiratory problems and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
